prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). A beautiful spread of many different Indian hand fans (pankhas) laid side by side: an appliqué cloth fan, a mirror-work fan, a sola-pith white fan, a palm-leaf fan, a bamboo fan, a brass temple fan with a long handle. Rich textures and varied colours. Warm museum-like light glowing against a dark ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
alt: A spread of beautifully different Indian hand fans — appliqué, mirror-work, palm leaf, bamboo — laid out together
